behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all relevant files (types.ts, UsageExportHeader.tsx, EntityUsage.tsx, UsageViewSelect.tsx, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md), the 'user' entity type, userDailyActivityCall endpoint, and required documentation topics.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and the desired behavior without specifying exact code changes, prop names, or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept multiple naming conventions (filterMode|selectMode|singleSelect|isSingle) and various value-adaptation patterns, allowing alternative correct implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run TypeScript compilation (tsc --noEmit) and execute npm test for EntityUsage.test.tsx, not just text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual TypeScript type acceptance, executing component tests, and specific structural patterns that a stub couldn't satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover EntityType union, view selector option, single/multi select mode, EntityUsage user handling, and AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md updates as required.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Code behavior tests, Config/documentation update tests, Pass-to-pass tests) and have descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output schema for this UI task.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers in instruction.md are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction lists files to look at but doesn't pinpoint specific buggy lines or exact replacements.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold diff for AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md adds only a few targeted lines, not full-file rewrites.
